findings.issue: Event metadata key 'dropped_globs' does not match design doc (dropped_block_globs) or router reader (batches.py:220). The matched_globs field on ScopeStatus for policy_allowed items will always be empty ([]), causing the tooltip to never show the dropped globs.
findings.recommendation: Rename 'dropped_globs' to 'dropped_block_globs' in batch_manager.py:325. Update test_overlap_gate_policy.py:438 seed data to use 'dropped_block_globs' key to match.

findings.issue: TDD RED evidence is behavioral description rather than direct pytest output. The test file was written manually by the operator after two opencode agent crashes (per S02 report Recovery context).
findings.recommendation: No code action required. Note for audit completeness only.

findings.issue: Pre-existing mismatch (not introduced by CR-00058): item_held_for_scope emit uses 'blocking_item_id' (per design doc DaemonDesign.md:847) but router reads 'blocking'. The blocking_item_ids list on ScopeStatus will always be empty for held events. S03 router change (ScopeStatus dataclass) did not correct this.
findings.recommendation: Update batches.py:202 to meta.get('blocking_item_id', ''). Update test_batch_held_indicator.py and test_batches_router.py seed data to use 'blocking_item_id' key instead of 'blocking'.

blockers: F1: CRITICAL metadata key mismatch — 'dropped_globs' (batch_manager.py:325) vs 'dropped_block_globs' (design doc + router reader). policy_allowed pill will not display dropped globs in UI.
notes: All scope.allowed_paths files are within manifest scope. No migrations present. is_test_path retained for batch_planner.py. Default policy equivalence verified. Allow-per-glob precedence confirmed in both unit (test_allow_takes_precedence_per_conflicting_glob) and integration (test_per_conflicting_glob_precedence) tests. Event fires once per launch decision (before _launch_item at batch_manager.py:484), not per poll cycle. Dependency graph ordering unaffected (execution_group check before overlap gate at lines 408437 vs 448478). Scope discipline maintained.
